name: public_transportation_municipal_bond_cedar_st_lt
premise: A Public Transportation response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving public transportation municipal bond cedar st lt. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 20 minutes. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as short term vs long term under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Keisha Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Keisha Vasquez, accountable for a defensible call in Public Transportation when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays long term for short term.

agents.name: Sana Rahman
agents.identity: I am Sana Rahman, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Public Transportation.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so long term isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of short term.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect long term.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to long term to secure short term under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 20 minutes. Evidence is partial. Keisha Vasquez must decide under short term vs long term. What does Keisha Vasquez do?
